input.description: Hola. Resulta que los clientes no pueden completar el pago (checkout) en la tienda de Colombia. Al presionar el botón de "Pagar", la pantalla se queda congelada por más de un minuto y en la consola web arroja un error "504 Gateway Timeout" seguido de un mensaje que dice "Stripe API rate limit exceeded". El fallo empezó hace 15 minutos exactos y el dinero no se debita

rag_response.summary: Customers are experiencing a checkout failure due to a '504 Gateway Timeout' error, which is triggered by exceeding the Stripe API rate limit. Affected component: payment service, specifically during the checkout process. User impact: This issue prevents customers from completing their payments, leading to increased frustration and potential loss of sales for the business.
suggested_actions: Monitor Stripe API usage and identify rate limit thresholds.
Implement exponential backoff for API requests to handle rate limiting gracefully.
Review and optimize the checkout process to reduce the number of API calls.
Contact Stripe support to discuss potential solutions or adjustments to the rate limit.
